name: Monkfish Kebob with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Monkfish filets, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate monkfish cubes for at least one hour.
2. Cut vegetables into chunks.
3. Place monkfish cubes and vegetables on kebab skewers.
4. Refrigerate the marinated skewers, covered, for three hours.
5. Preheat the oven to broil setting.
6. Broil the skewers, lightly basting and turning often, for approximately 8-10 minutes.
7. Serves 4 (2 kebobs each).
